summary: Iteration 101 - Phase 2 Features Testing Complete. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Competitor Intelligence Phase 2 (battle cards, scrape-all, daily briefings) fully functional. Claret AI Phase 2 (web_context support, sales coaching with conversion rates) working. CEO Commission Approval endpoints verified. Closed leads color-coding implemented in both Kanban and Table views. Team Mood section exists in Executive Dashboard code but requires mood data to display.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 101 verified Phase 2 features: 1) Competitor Intelligence: GET /api/intelligence/competitors returns 6 seeded competitors, POST scrape triggers web scraping, POST battle-card generates AI battle cards using Claude, GET battle-card retrieves stored cards, POST scrape-all batch scrapes all competitors, GET daily-briefing returns personalized sections. 2) Claret AI: POST /api/claret/chat accepts web_context parameter for real-time web search injection, sales coaching includes conversion rate data. 3) CEO Commission Approval: GET /api/commissions/approval-status and POST /api/commissions/approve endpoints working. 4) Sales CRM color-coding: Enrolled leads have green styling (emerald-500), rejected leads have red styling (rose-500) in both Kanban cards and Table rows. 5) Executive Dashboard: Team Mood Pulse section exists (data-testid='team-mood-section') but only displays when teamMood.teams has data. 6) Claret Widget: Opens from bottom-left purple button, shows mood indicator and chat interface. 7) Claret Dashboard at /claret shows mood scores (Energy, Stress, Motivation, Happiness, Overall) and Mood Journey chart.

competitor_intelligence_phase2.details: All 6 seeded competitors displayed. Scrape All button works. Battle Card tab shows Generate button or card content. Daily briefing endpoint returns personalized sections.

battle_card_generation.details: POST /api/intelligence/competitors/{id}/battle-card generates AI battle card with overview, strengths, weaknesses, our_advantages, objection_counters, key_talking_points.

claret_ai_web_context.details: POST /api/claret/chat accepts web_context parameter. When provided, Claret uses real-time web data in responses.

claret_sales_coaching.details: Claret provides sales coaching with conversion rate data when asked about sales performance.

ceo_commission_approval.details: GET /api/commissions/approval-status returns approval records. POST /api/commissions/approve endpoint exists and accepts requests.

closed_leads_color_coding_kanban.details: Kanban cards have border-l-4 border-l-emerald-500 bg-emerald-500/5 for enrolled, border-l-4 border-l-rose-500 bg-rose-500/5 for rejected.

closed_leads_color_coding_table.details: Table rows have bg-emerald-500/5 border-l-2 border-l-emerald-500 for enrolled, bg-rose-500/5 border-l-2 border-l-rose-500 for rejected.

team_mood_endpoint.details: GET /api/executive/team-mood returns {teams: [...]} with mood scores per team.

scatter_data_endpoint.details: GET /api/commissions/scatter-data returns salary + commission data for Net Pay chart.

claret_widget.details: Purple button in bottom-left opens Claret chat widget with mood indicator (Motivated) and chat interface.

claret_dashboard.details: Claret Dashboard at /claret shows mood scores (Energy 8, Stress 8, Motivation 9, Happiness 8, Overall 8) and Mood Journey chart.

notes.puter_js_web_search: Puter.js web search is loaded from CDN in browser. Backend web_context parameter tested instead. Frontend shows 'Searching the web...' indicator when Puter.js is available.
notes.auto_scrape_scheduler: Auto-scrape scheduler starts at 04:00 UTC daily. Logs to backend.err.log. Cannot test in real-time but code verified in competitor_intel.py lines 491-538.
